insn CPUID vmx-exit(cpuid-unconditional) frozen-model-s2 intercept
insn FXRSTOR permit-native arch-state arch
insn FXSAVE permit-native arch-state+mxcsr-pin arch
insn HLT vmx-exit(hlt-exiting) idle-skip-s3 intercept
insn HRESET fault-absent ud fault-absent
insn INVEPT vmx-exit(vmx-instr-unconditional) ud intercept
insn INVVPID vmx-exit(vmx-instr-unconditional) ud intercept
insn MONITOR vmx-exit(monitor-exiting) ud intercept
insn MWAIT vmx-exit(mwait-exiting) ud intercept
insn PCONFIG fault-absent ud fault-absent
insn RDPID fault-absent ud fault-absent
insn RDPKRU cr4-pin(pke=0) ud intercept
insn RDPMC vmx-exit(rdpmc-exiting) gp intercept
insn RDRAND vmx-exit(rdrand-exiting) seeded-prng intercept
insn RDSEED vmx-exit(rdseed-exiting) seeded-prng intercept
insn RDTSC vmx-exit(rdtsc-exiting) vclock.tsc intercept
insn RDTSCP vmx-exit(rdtsc-exiting) vclock.tsc+tsc-aux intercept
insn SERIALIZE fault-absent ud fault-absent
insn SHA fault-absent ud fault-absent
insn TPAUSE fault-absent ud fault-absent
insn UMONITOR fault-absent ud fault-absent
insn UMWAIT fault-absent ud fault-absent
insn VMCALL vmx-exit(vmcall-unconditional) hypercall-dispatch intercept
insn VMCLEAR vmx-exit(vmx-instr-unconditional) ud intercept
insn VMLAUNCH vmx-exit(vmx-instr-unconditional) ud intercept
insn VMPTRLD vmx-exit(vmx-instr-unconditional) ud intercept
insn VMPTRST vmx-exit(vmx-instr-unconditional) ud intercept
insn VMREAD vmx-exit(vmx-instr-unconditional) ud intercept
insn VMRESUME vmx-exit(vmx-instr-unconditional) ud intercept
insn VMWRITE vmx-exit(vmx-instr-unconditional) ud intercept
insn VMXOFF vmx-exit(vmx-instr-unconditional) ud intercept
insn VMXON vmx-exit(vmx-instr-unconditional) ud intercept
insn WRPKRU cr4-pin(pke=0) ud intercept
insn XABORT fault-absent ud fault-absent
insn XBEGIN fault-absent ud fault-absent
insn XEND fault-absent ud fault-absent
insn XGETBV0 permit-native xcr0 arch
insn XGETBV1 native-uninterceptable xinuse-out-of-scope scope
insn XRSTOR permit-native arch-state arch
insn XRSTORS native-uninterceptable out-of-scope scope
insn XSAVE permit-native arch-state+mxcsr-pin arch
insn XSAVEC native-uninterceptable out-of-scope scope
insn XSAVEOPT native-uninterceptable out-of-scope scope
insn XSAVES native-uninterceptable out-of-scope scope
insn XSETBV vmx-exit(xsetbv-unconditional) xcr0-menu{1,3,7}-else-gp intercept
insn XTEST fault-absent ud fault-absent

host-assert family-model-stepping 06_9e_0c
host-assert host-microcode-rev 0x00000000000000f8
host-assert guest-ucode-rev 0x0000000100000000
host-assert mxcsr-mask 0x0000ffff
host-assert maxphyaddr-min 39
host-assert rtm-disabled true
host-assert cr4-force-reserved [PKE, PKS]
host-assert host-absent HRESET
host-assert host-absent PCONFIG
host-assert host-absent RDPID
host-assert host-absent SERIALIZE
host-assert host-absent SHA
host-assert host-absent TPAUSE
host-assert host-absent UMONITOR
host-assert host-absent UMWAIT
